title: Adjust Text Widget for Formatting Bar
excerpt: When editing in the Text Widget, the text formatting bar hides the bottom line of text, making it difficult to work with the last line of text in the widget.

posts.author: ryan.sealey (Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml: When editing in the Text Widget, the text formatting bar hides the bottom line of text, making it difficult to work with the last line of text in the widget.
